title: Did Google Just Fall Behind Again?, WWDC Preview, Anthropic Files To Go Public
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss whether Google is falling behind in AI as OpenAI and Anthropic advance with coding agents and super-app plans. The conversation explores how AI agents may reshape web, email, app, and browser usage, potentially disadvantaging Google's core search business. Topics also include Apple's WWDC, Meta's subscription strategy, and Anthropic's IPO filing.
